content.en:
"Eight stars!"

His Highness Tianxuan was not very satisfied with his evaluation of his potential, he thought that his potential should be higher than that of His Highness Blood Wind.

However, it was obvious that even if his potential was higher than that of His Highness the Blood Wind, he still did not reach the nine-star potential.

Swish!

His Royal Highness Tianxuan's gaze suddenly looked at Ye Tian, guessing in his heart that Ye Tian's potential could reach several stars.

Although I don't want to admit it, I have to admit that Ye Tian is very good in every aspect, otherwise he would not be able to break through the Ten Tribulations of the Supreme Mountain and become the second emperor in the universe to break through the Ten Tribulations of the Supreme Mountain.

Therefore, His Royal Highness Tianxuan also recognized that Ye Tian's potential was higher than him.

However, His Royal Highness Tianxuan still hoped that Ye Tian's potential would not reach the Nine Stars.

"Don't reach nine stars!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan said secretly.

"Your Highness Wanfa, there aren't many people left, aren't you going to test your potential?"

His Highness Bloodwind asked.

Ye Tian smiled slightly, walked up, and said, "Okay, then I'll test it!"

His right hand touched the crystal pillar, and it was immediately infused with power.

Airplanes!!!

The crystal pillar shone brightly, and two ancient words emerged.

Not eight stars!

The first word is different from eight, which shows that Ye Tian's potential is not an eight-star potential.

"Nine stars!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan and His Royal Highness Blood Wind subconsciously exclaimed.

But when they sensed these two ancient words, the meaning they felt from them was not what they thought.

"It's not nine stars, it's ...... Ten stars!"

At this moment, His Highness Tianxuan, His Highness the Blood Wind, and the other gods were dumbfounded, their eyes widened, and they couldn't believe it.

"It's impossible to !!"

His Highness Tianxuan was stimulated and yelled.

In fact, if Ye Tian is a nine-star potential, although he will be jealous, he will not be too surprised, after all, Ye Tian's strength is stronger than him, he is perfect in all aspects, and he has a variety of god-level talents, such a potential is higher than him, he has nothing to say.

However, what Ye Tian had was not a nine-star potential, but a ten-star potential, so he was not jealous, but felt that it was not real.

There is a big gap between the seven-star potential and the eight-star potential, and the gap between the eight-star potential and the nine-star potential is definitely very large, as for the ten-star potential, they didn't know that there was still this level of potential before, thinking that the nine-star was the highest.

It is conceivable that the gap between the eight-star potential and the ten-star potential is so big that they can't imagine it.

Before Ye Tian didn't rise, His Royal Highness Tianxuan was known as the First Emperor-level Highness of the universe, but now he has completely become Ye Tian's foil, and the sense of loss and blow in his heart is unimaginable.

"Ten stars!"

Ye Tian was also surprised, he originally thought that his talent could only reach nine stars, but he didn't expect it to be ten stars potential.

"It should have something to do with my talent, my cultivation talent has surpassed those supreme and reached the supreme cultivation talent, and I also have a large number of god-level talents, which are simply incomparable to others, plus my strength has reached the combat power of His Royal Highness the supreme level, and it is far beyond others, although the combined potential has reached ten stars!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Before, Ye Tian's achievements were famous among the major clans in the universe, and many god-level knew Ye Tian's strength, and now Ye Tian's potential had reached an unprecedented ten-star level, which suddenly aroused everyone's jealousy, envy, worship or shock.

Soon after, other god-level people also tested their potential one by one, and there were only three people who had reached the eight-star potential, one of them was also a first-grade Eternal Ancient-level Highness, and it was an Eternal Ancient-level Highness of the Angel Clan, and his strength was not as good as His Highness Tianxuan and His Highness the Blood Wind, but Ye Tian knew the reason why this person could rank among the eight-star potential.

Because this Angel Clan's Eternal Ancient Highness has a mixed-level cultivation talent, as long as the cultivation talent of this level is cultivated step by step, he can definitely become a powerhouse above the Domination Realm, even if he can't become a supreme, he can definitely become a Tianzun-level powerhouse.

Tianzun is the realm above the master, and it is also a realm title that is universally recognized by all races in the universe.

The Supreme is actually a level of the Tianzun realm, just a title of the strongest Tianzun, and its strength far exceeds that of Tianzun, but in fact, it is still in the same realm as Tianzun.

is like Tianjiao, the son of the emperor-level universe, in fact, he also belongs to the emperor level, but his strength is far beyond the ordinary emperor level.

But the mixed-level cultivation talent is a condition for becoming a supreme, if you don't even have a mixed-level cultivation talent, there is no way to impact the Heavenly Venerable level or even the supreme level.

Of course, some powerful races naturally have the means to change their lives against the sky, and some cultivators have only the rank of chaos, but their combat power is qualified to become supreme gods.

For example, a master is extremely powerful, but his cultivation talent is only at the chaos level, and he can't become a celestial venerable.

But such a master, once he becomes a Tianzun, there will be a great hope of becoming a Tianzun, then he will definitely cultivate this master at all costs, so that he can have a mixed-level cultivation talent.

Of course.

A cosmic clan, even a god clan, would not improve its cultivation talent when it was weak, otherwise if it fell halfway, the loss would be great.

Just like His Highness Tianxuan, his cultivation talent is only at the chaos level, and the Protoss has a way to raise his cultivation talent to the mixed level, but it requires a huge price, but now it will not improve his cultivation talent, but will only wait for His Highness Tianxuan to reach the peak of the master level, test its true potential, and then decide whether to improve his cultivation talent.

In the universe, there are too few creatures who are born with mixed-level cultivation talents, and this Constant-level Highness of the Angel Clan should belong to the innate mixed-level cultivation talents, which is very rare, so the potential is very high.

It didn't take long for all the god levels in the hall to be tested.

Suddenly.

A voice resounded throughout the hall.

"Creatures with potential above five stars enter the inner hall of the Yuan Gu Palace, and creatures with potential below five stars enter the outer hall!"

As soon as the words fell, a part of the god level was removed.

These god levels are all god levels below the five-star potential, and they have been moved to the outer hall, and it is estimated that there is no gain in the outer hall, and this time entering the Yuan Gu Hall is not a big gain.

Then, Ye Tian's god level with potential above five stars was also removed.

Yuangu Palace, Inner Temple.

"No one?"

Ye Tian glanced around and found that the other highnesses were gone, and he was the only one here.

The environment he was in now was a small hall with portals on the walls, and each portal had some introduction.

The text here is similar to the previous star potential evaluation text, although Ye Tian doesn't know it, he can sense the meaning contained in it.

"Normal!"

"Hard!"

"Hell difficulty!"

"Death-level difficulty!"

"Heaven-defying difficulty!"

There are a total of five portals, each of which corresponds to an assessment difficulty, which can be freely chosen.

"Which one should I choose?"

Ye Tian hesitated.
